high.title: Unsanitized user input in dynamic HTML insertion (XSS)
high.description: ## Description There are XSS vulnerabilities when dynamically inserting HTML that contains unsanitized data. ## Remediations Make sure you use HTML sanitization library before inserting html ```javascript import sanitizeHtml from 'sanitize-html'; const html = `${user.Input}`; document.body.innerHTML = sanitizeHtml(html) ``` ## Resources - [OWASP XSS explained](https://owasp.org/www-community/attacks/xss/)
